author: Bernard de Parentis
title: Tractatus utilis super totum officium missae
remarks: Saragossa 1478, 1484 Cologne; Strasbourg, 1487; Egg 2442, UER MS 481, Bodl. 787; Brunet (Pientinis (de), Benedictus; the author has been called Bernardo Parentino by several bibliographers, but in the beginning of this work [i.e., Liber de expositione vel declaratione Misse, 1478], he calls himself Frater Benedictus de Pentinis, shortened form of Pientinis; at the end of the ed. of 1487 he is called Benedictus de Parentinis). Scriptores Ordinis Praedicatorum, 1959: index (Parentinis, Bernardus de) I, 611 (F. Bernardus de Parentinis, b. in Orthesium [Orthez], fl. mid-4th cent.) [Inc: Quoniam clamitat sapiens]. Clm 16195, f. 30; 7449, 8855, 14691, 16195, 16213, 18426, 26921; CFrk. 72, 108CFl. XI, 99; Gdańsk, PAN, Biblioteka Gdańska, Ms Mar. F 249
